prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约75名、69名、68名、86名、89名，整体呈先升后降再小幅后移趋势；2021–2023年稳定在68–75名区间，2024年起后 移至86–89名，近两年累计后移约21名；2025年基准位次约89名；该校在安徽省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年46人、2022年45人、2023年45人、2024年45人 、2025年52人、2026年54人。2025年较2024年扩招7人（+15.6%），2026年再扩招2人（+3.8%），连续两年扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居全国第1名，是中国最顶尖的高等学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；20 26年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应、校园安全及食堂宿舍等舆情事件；抖音热度排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大；2021–2025年投档线异常记录为低关注，未见 明显断档。整体声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制部分考生的报考热情，但清华作为顶尖名校，影响有限；清华大学拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科包括计算机科学 与技术、力学、材料科学与工程、电气工程、建筑学、工商管理、马克思主义理论等，学科实力全国顶尖；招生专业覆盖计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类、工科试验班等，与优 势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，人工智能谨慎观望，土木建筑分化观望。 清华相关专业均为社会高度关注的热门方向，报考热度持续；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，按近年比例估算物理类约31.4万人，较2025年32.1万人略降约2.1%，竞争程度略 有缓解；清华大学位于北京市，属跨省招生；该校在安徽省招生计划占全国总计划比例较小，但安徽为生源大省，考生对 顶尖名校的跨省报考意愿强烈，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次89名、2026年计划扩招2人（+3.8%）、物理类考生总数略降约2.1%、声誉偏 负面轻微抑制、清华顶尖名校地位稳固等因素，扩招效应略大于考生减少效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约94名，区间64–124 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science (Physics Category) were approximately 75, 69, 68, 86, and 89, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then slightly shifting backward; from 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the 68–75 range, and from 2024 onward, it shifted backward to 86–89, with a cumulative backward shift of about 21 places in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 89; the university's enrollment plan for Science (Physics Category) in Anhui Province: 46 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 52 in 2025, and 54 in 2026. Compared to 2024, 2025 saw an expansion of 7 students (+15.6%), and 2026 will see an additional expansion of 2 students (+3.8%), with two consecutive years of expansion slightly intensifying competition, leading to larger ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking first nationally in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, making it the top higher education institution in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring students; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents such as school management responses, campus safety, and cafeteria dormitories; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure; from 2021 to 2025, abnormal admission score records are low concern, with no obvious gaps. The overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress some students' enthusiasm for applying, but as a top prestigious university, the impact is limited; Tsinghua University has 39 A- or above disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Mechanics, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, Business Administration, and Marxist Theory, with top national disciplinary strength; enrollment majors cover Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Automation Class, Engineering Experimental Class, etc., highly matching its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows: Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed, and Civil Engineering and Architecture are differentiated and observed. Tsinghua's related majors are all highly socially concerned popular directions, with sustained application enthusiasm; the total number of Anhui Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 314,000 based on recent proportions, slightly decreasing by about 2.1% compared to 2025's 321,000, slightly easing competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, a cross-province enrollment; the university's enrollment plan in Anhui Province accounts for a small proportion of the national total, but Anhui is a major source province, with strong willingness among students to apply to top prestigious universities across provinces, and regional preference has a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 89, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+3.8%), a slight decrease of about 2.1% in the total number of Physics Category students, a slight negative reputation mildly suppressing, and Tsinghua's solid top prestigious university status, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the decrease in students, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 94, and a range of 64–124.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong College) (including Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology).

- Engineering Experimental Class (Shuimu College).

- Clinical Medicine Class (PUMC) (8 years)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Ziqiang College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 94, range 64–124. If ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Automation Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Class, Xinya College, Wuqiong College) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment Class, Clinical Medicine Class) as a safe backup. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 64), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次分别为约8名、12名、21名（2024年）、23名（2025年）；整体呈后移趋势，从2021年8名逐步后移至2025 年23名，近4年累计后移约15名；2025年基准位次约23名；该校在安徽省文科（历史类）招生计划：2021年2人、2022年2人、2024年2人、2025年3人、2026年（§ 7文件）3人。2025年较2024年扩招1人（+50%），2026年计划与2025年持平，招生规模极小，竞争高度集中。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校， 软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居全国第1名，文科虽非传统强项，但依托顶尖综合实力，文科试验班类、法学类等专业仍具极高吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面 ，主要涉及学校管理回应、校园安全及食堂宿舍等舆情；抖音热度排名第2（高热），曝光量极大；2021–2025年投档线异常记录为低关注，未见明显断档。声誉偏负面可能轻微抑 制报考热度，但影响有限；清华大学文科相关学科实力突出：法学 A+、马克思主义理论 A+、新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A+、应用经济学 A、社会学 A-、中国语言文学 A-等，文科试验班类（至善书院）涵盖经济学、社会学等优势学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示：法学推荐、汉语言推荐、金融/财经/经济分化观望、新闻 传播明显劝退。清华文科招生专业（法学类、文科试验班类）均为社会关注方向；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，按近年比例估算历史类约13.7万人，较2025年14.1万人略降 约3.0%，竞争略有缓解；清华大学位于北京市，属跨省招生；文科招生计划仅3人，名额极少，报考竞争高度集中，考生 需位次极优才有机会。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23名、2026年招生计划持平、历史类考生总数略降约3.0%、声誉偏负面轻微抑制、清华顶尖名校地位等因素，考生减 少效应略占主导，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约20名，区间10–30名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 8th, 12th, 21st (2024), and 23rd (2025); overall, there is a trend of moving backward, from 8th in 2021 gradually to 23rd in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 15 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 23rd; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Anhui Province: 2 in 2021, 2 in 2022, 2 in 2024, 3 in 2025, and 3 in 2026 (according to §7 document). In 2025, there is an expansion of 1 student (+50%) compared to 2024, and the 2026 plan remains the same as 2025, with a very small enrollment scale and highly concentrated competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking first in the country for 6 consecutive years in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings; although liberal arts are not its traditional strength, relying on its top comprehensive strength, programs such as the Liberal Arts Experimental Class and Law Class still have extremely high appeal; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses, campus safety, and dormitory cafeteria issues; Douyin popularity ranks 2nd (high heat), with massive exposure; the abnormal record of admission scores from 2021 to 2025 is low attention, with no obvious gaps. The somewhat negative reputation may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, but the impact is limited; Tsinghua University's liberal arts-related disciplines are outstanding: Law A+, Marxist Theory A+, Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A, Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, etc., and the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Zhishu College) covers advantageous disciplines such as Economics and Sociology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows: Law is recommended, Chinese Language is recommended, Finance/Economics is divided with a wait-and-see attitude, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. Tsinghua's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law Class, Liberal Arts Experimental Class) are all socially concerned directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province college entrance examination is about 451,000, with an estimated history category of about 137,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease of about 3.0% compared to 141,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, which is cross-province enrollment; the liberal arts enrollment plan is only 3 students, with very few spots, making application competition highly concentrated, requiring candidates to have excellent rankings for a chance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23rd, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining the same, a slight decrease of about 3.0% in the total number of history category candidates, a somewhat negative reputation slightly suppressing, and Tsinghua's top university status, the effect of the decrease in candidates slightly dominates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 20th, and a range of 10–30.

- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics, Finance and Management) (including Economics and Finance (International Class)).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 20th, range 10–30. Only 3 liberal arts enrollment spots, making ranking competition extremely intense. Within the predicted range, it is recommended to choose Law Class as a safe option, and Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Zhishu College, Economics, Finance and Management) as a reach target. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10th), focus on reaching for the top majors in the Liberal Arts Experimental Class.
